items.title: National Biodiversity Authority constitutes Expert Committee on Invasive Alien Species
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change National Biodiversity Authority constitutes Expert Committee on Invasive Alien Species Posted On: 21 MAR 2026 9:05AM by PIB Delhi In pursuance of the directions of the National Green Tribunal, the National Biodiversity Authority (NBA) has constituted an Expert Committee on Invasive Alien Species to address the growing ecological…

items.title: PDUNASS Conducts DoPT-Sponsored Training Programme on Experiential Learning Tools
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Labour & Employment PDUNASS Conducts DoPT-Sponsored Training Programme on Experiential Learning Tools Posted On: 21 MAR 2026 9:55AM by PIB Delhi The Pandit Deendayal Upadhyaya National Academy of Social Security (PDUNASS), the apex training institute of the Employees’ Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO), organised a five-day Training Programme on Experiential Learning…
